title: TaCZ Runtime Compat
description: Fixes custom TaCZ gun packs so they work properly in large modpacks without crashing.
body:
In small or simple mod setups, custom guns usually work fine. However, in large modpacks, you may encounter errors like:

"net.minecraft.resourceLocationException: Non [a-z0-9/._-] character in path of location: tacz:gun"

This happens because some custom gun packs contain invalid resource paths that break under stricter loading conditions.

This mod automatically fixes those issues at runtime, allowing your custom **TaCZ** gun packs to load and function correctly even in large modpacks.

- Fixes invalid resource path errors
- Prevents crashes in large modpacks
- Ensures custom TaCZ guns load properly
- Works automatically — no setup needed

## Requirements:
- [[UNOFFICIAL] TaCZ 1.21.1 NeoForge Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-1.21.1)
- [TaCZ Pack Upgrader](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-pack-upgrader)

## How to use:
1. Install TaCZ and TaCZ Pack Upgrader
2. Put your custom gun packs into the "tacz" folder
3. Install this mod
4. Launch the game — done!

This mod does not add any content. It only ensures your custom guns work smoothly, especially in large modpacks.
